title: Kin Follower
move_pattern: Standard follower starts with Quick Slash → Boomerang → Power Dance → Quick Slash (repeats). If StartsWithDance is set, starts with Power Dance instead.
notes: Minion Power is applied on spawn. When all KinFollowers die, the KinPriest's AllFollowerDeathResponse is triggered. The StartsWithDance property can alter the starting move. Music parameter 'the_kin_progress' is updated on death.
